update.name: System - JS Optimize
update.description:
System - JS Optimize Plugin. Minifies and defers JavaScript loading for Joomla 4/5/6 sites. Improves Core Web Vitals and PageSpeed Insights scores. Lightweight, no third-party dependencies. Compatible with Gantry, Cassiopeia and Helix Ultimate templates.
SHA-Bundle: 553246736447566b583138424f344c3358376f674c4f425a4b753964646d3275556353435854395052615457626d6150764e582f5679625949745854687a445a6c42702b67516677567379414c6934326e615338676947676c79444e52632f31684a50366534516352362b6e7553794f73565365527359306f42533268796262
